__fixture__.name: imported
__fixture__.scenario: An imported LSIF-style precomputed graph index is attached alongside the live semantic graph. The frame carries freshness = imported and stale_reason = imported_from_external; consumers display it in a read-only surface, never merge it into authoritative state, and always disclose the external source.
adr_sections: Authoritative versus derived state (imported frames never claim authority)
Minimal ordering, replay, and imported-history assumptions

caused_by.note: LSIF bundle was produced by an external pre-indexer; it is surfaced read-only and never merged into authoritative graph state.
